name: basic_subarray_match
description: sub [2,3] is a contiguous subarray of arr [1,2,3,4,5]

name: prefix_match
description: sub [1,2] matches the prefix of arr [1,2,3]

name: suffix_match
description: sub [4,5] matches the suffix of arr [1,2,3,4,5]

name: empty_sub
description: Empty sub is always a subarray

name: sub_longer_than_arr
description: sub longer than arr cannot be a subarray

name: non_contiguous_elements
description: sub [1,3] shares elements but is not contiguous in arr [1,2,3]

name: no_common_elements
description: sub [7,8] has no common elements with arr [1,2,3,4,5]

name: single_element_found
description: Single element sub [3] exists in arr

name: single_element_not_found
description: Single element sub [9] does not exist in arr

name: partial_overlap_not_subarray
description: sub [3,4,6] partially overlaps but is not a contiguous subarray

name: repeated_elements_match
description: sub [2,2] is a contiguous subarray of arr [1,2,2,3]

name: both_empty
description: Both sub and arr are empty
